name: expert-system
description: Tiered agent routing system for software development — lean single-dispatch and full decomposed pipeline modes.

commands.name: experts
commands.description: Lean mode: Router → single Worker with methodology skills preloaded (use with Claude Opus/Sonnet)

commands.name: agents-experts
commands.description: Pipeline mode: Router → Planner → Workers → Validator loop (use with Copilot or weaker models)

commands.name: books-status
commands.description: Show knowledge library coverage and quality report

commands.name: ingest-local-sources
commands.description: Encode a local PDF or text file into the knowledge base
